summary: The implementation comprehensively addresses all requirements with a professional single-page corporate website featuring hero section, about section, services showcase, contact form with backend integration, responsive navigation, and footer. The design uses a sophisticated warm earth-tone color palette (terracotta, amber, charcoal) that aligns with corporate aesthetics while avoiding blue/purple per requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact form must include a 'subject' field
missing_requirements.reason: The contact form implements name, email, and message fields, but the BuildRequest acceptance criteria explicitly requires 'name, email, subject, and message fields'. The implementation omits the subject field.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notifications system using Sonner library
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation includes toast notifications for form submission feedback (toast.success, toast.error) which was not requested in the BuildRequest. While this enhances UX, it was not specified.

The backend and frontend include full Internet Identity authentication setup (useInternetIdentity hook, AuthClient integration), but the BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or member login system' as a non-goal.
The CSS includes comprehensive dark mode styling (.dark class with complete color palette), but dark mode or theme switching was not requested in the BuildRequest.
The backend implements getInquiry and getAllInquiries query methods, but the requirements only specify storing submissions and user confirmation. No admin panel or inquiry retrieval was requested.

The backend includes an updateContactInfo method allowing dynamic modification of contact details, but the BuildRequest only requires displaying static contact information, not admin functionality to update it.
